testCases.name: test_case_0
testCases.input: Write a professional cold email applying for this AI/ML role
testCases.actualOutput:
Subject: Application for AI/ML Role at Endee - Enhancing Vector Database Performance

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to express my interest in the AI/ML role at Endee, where I can leverage my skills in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and data management to contribute to the development of high-performance vector databases for production AI systems.

With a strong background in AI/ML and data science, I possess expertise in designing and implementing scalable data architectures, developing predictive models, and optimizing database performance. My proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, and C++ enables me to efficiently work with various data formats and integrate them with Endee's vector database.

I am particularly drawn to Endee's innovative approach to enhancing vector database performance and its potential to revolutionize the field of AI. I am confident that my skills and experience make me a strong fit for this role, and I am eager to discuss how I can contribute to the success of your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my qualifications further and explore how I can help drive the growth and development of Endee's AI/ML capabilities.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
retrievalContext: Endee - High-Performance Vector Database for Production AI Systems
